title: Father and Jupiter
body: Astrology makes much of the position of the planets at the moment of one's birth. The only known force a planet exerts on Earth is gravitational. At birth, a $$4.20-kg$$ baby has a 100-kg father $$0.200$$ $$m$$ away, and Jupiter (mass $$1.898\times{10}^{27}$$ kg) is at its closest distance to Earth, some $$6.29\times{10}^{11}$$ $$m$$ away. Take $$G=6.674\times{10}^{-11}$$ $$\frac{N m^2}{{kg}^2}$$.
